original_image_tags: Large faded stamp in upper left corner reading "COPY".

elements.description: A large, faded stamp in the upper left corner with the word 'COPY' inside a double-lined rectangular border. Below the rectangle, the text 'SUBJECT: Reporting of Information on "Flying Discs"' is typed, followed by a list of addressees and several paragraphs of typed text detailing reporting procedures.
A 'RESTRICTED' stamp appears at the top center and bottom center of the page. The top stamp is slightly faded. The bottom stamp is clear and centered.
A large, slanted, handwritten annotation in cursive ink on the right side of the page reads 'Rescinded per ltr 11g USAF dated 16 Jan 45'.

judge.reason: Description A mentions only a 'COPY' stamp, while Description B describes multiple distinct stamps ('COPY' in a border, 'RESTRICTED' stamps) and a handwritten annotation, indicating different visual content.
